text: I feel as though I am in a place devoted to innovation and contemplation. The glow of blue lights and the glass partitions give the environment a futuristic, almost introspective quality. The mention of "R + D" on the wall makes me aware of the endless quest for knowledge and improvement, and I feel a sense of curiosity and expectation—an eagerness to discover what new ideas or connections might emerge here. It is quiet, with an energy of potential all around.
